payload.author: Bri
payload.body:
Milestone A DONE (commit): SCOPE_CLOUD mode makes the existing single-instance hub deployable + safe — binds 0.0.0.0, drops Bonjour/LAN-TLS, requires the bearer token on every request (no loopback bypass via new authMiddleware trustLoopback=false), /healthz open for the LB. Realtime works via the in-process bus. Integration-tested (test/cloud-mode.test.js).

Milestone B REMAINING (the full module assembly this ticket also covers): wire the Postgres backend (pg/store + replay) gated on SCOPE_PG_URL, hosted OIDC auth middleware (auth_hosted/* — note the spec flagged a missing createHostedAuthMiddleware + OIDC routes), LISTEN/NOTIFY fan-out (realtime/bus) replacing the in-process bus for >1 instance, and quota middleware (quota/*). Keeping ticket in_review for the A-cut; B is the next phase.
